rationale: Updates one anchor element in js/nav.js: the Instagram footer link's href changes from '#' to 'https://www.instagram.com/indisartbook', and the tag gains target="_blank" rel="noopener" attributes. The PR body says the goal is to link the Instagram button to indisartbook and open it in a new tab, and the diff implements exactly that with security-conscious rel='noopener'. No other elements (Artsy, Contact) were modified, no tests touched.
